source: Aggregated from public deal sites (Doctor of Credit, AwardWallet, Upgraded Points, Frequent Miler)

offers.description: Earn $5 when you activate Paze and $50 when you spend $100 or more at participating Paze merchants. Works at Newegg, Broadway.com, and other Paze-enabled retailers.
offers.terms: $5 for activation + $50 on $100+ purchase. Chase Visa cards work better than Mastercards at some merchants. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $75 cash back when you make a qualifying wireless payment of at least $100 with AT&T. Must be a new AT&T Wireless customer.
offers.terms: New AT&T Wireless customers only. Not valid on accessories, equipment, AT&T PREPAID, or Cricket. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $30 cash back when you book a Turo car rental of $150 or more through turo.com or the Turo app. Valid for U.S. and Canadian reservations.
offers.terms: Turo app or Turo.com only. One-time offer. U.S. and Canadian reservations. No gift cards. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on Lyft rides when you spend $100 or more. Some cards may see a 5% variant instead.
offers.terms: One-time use. Not valid on third-party services. Some cards offer 5% variant. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get 15% cash back when you spend $15 or more on Airalo eSIM data plans for international travel. Some cards offer 10% or 5% variant.
offers.terms: One-time use. Direct merchant purchases only. Some cards offer 10% or 5%. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $40 or more on Brightline train tickets in Florida.
offers.terms: One-time use. Direct merchant purchases, in-store or website. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 30% cash back on a Sam's Club membership purchase. Great value when combined with a new or renewal membership.
offers.terms: Membership purchase only. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get 15% cash back on IKEA purchases, up to $41 cash back. Targeted offer available on select Chase cards.
offers.terms: In-store and IKEA.com. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Sapphire Reserve cardholders get 100% cash back on a 1-year Calm Premium subscription when you spend $34.99 or more at calm.com.
offers.terms: Sapphire Reserve cardholders only. Online at calm.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 15% cash back on Verizon Business wireless service purchases.
offers.terms: Verizon Business accounts only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% cash back on United Airlines flight purchases made directly with United.
offers.terms: Direct United.com purchases only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: IHG cardholders earn 20% cash back on gas station purchases, up to $6 cash back. Great everyday savings on fuel.
offers.terms: IHG co-branded cards only. Gas station purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: IHG cardholders earn 10% cash back on a single airfare purchase of $499.99 or more made directly with an airline.
offers.terms: IHG co-branded cards only. Online airfare direct with airline. One-time use. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on CVS purchases, up to $5 cash back. Works in-store and on CVS.com.
offers.terms: In-store and CVS.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back at Starbucks, up to $3 back. Some cards may see 5% or 15% variants. Works in-store and in the Starbucks app.
offers.terms: In-store and Starbucks app. Targeted offer — value may vary (5%, 10%, or 15%). Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $100 cash back when you spend $600 or more on Chase Travel hotel, airfare, car rental, or tour bookings in a single transaction.
offers.terms: Targeted offer. Single transaction on Chase Travel portal. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Q1 2026 bonus category: Earn 5% cash back on dining (restaurants, fast food, delivery apps), Norwegian Cruise Line, and American Heart Association donations. Freedom Flex earns up to 7x total on dining.
offers.terms: Freedom Flex and Freedom cards only. Must activate by 3/14/2026. Up to $1,500 in combined purchases. Includes DoorDash, UberEats.

offers.description: Q1 2026 spending bonus on co-branded Chase cards: Earn 5x points at grocery stores, gas stations, and restaurants. Available on Southwest, United, British Airways, Aer Lingus, Marriott, and IHG cards.
offers.terms: Jan 15 – Mar 31, 2026. Up to $1,000 in eligible spend. Available on select co-branded cards. Must register. Allow 8 weeks for points.

offers.description: IHG One Rewards Premier cardholders earn 7x points at grocery stores, gas stations, and restaurants during Q1 2026. Best-in-class multiplier for everyday spending.
offers.terms: IHG One Rewards Premier card only. Jan 15 – Mar 31, 2026. Up to $1,000 in eligible spend. Must register.

offers.description: Sapphire Reserve cardholders get up to $250 in statement credits on prepaid Chase Travel hotel bookings of 2+ nights at IHG, Montage, Pendry, Omni, Virgin Hotels, and more through 2026.
offers.terms: Sapphire Reserve / Reserve for Business only. 2026 only benefit. Prepaid Chase Travel hotel bookings. 2+ night stays at partner hotels.

offers.description: Transfer Chase Ultimate Rewards points to Marriott Bonvoy at a 50% bonus rate — get 1,500 Marriott points for every 1,000 Chase points transferred. Limited time promotion.
offers.terms: Transfer from Chase Ultimate Rewards to Marriott Bonvoy. 50% bonus through 2/28/2026. Allow 1-2 business days for transfer.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more on Air India flights. One-time use, direct airline purchases only.
offers.terms: Direct merchant purchases only. One-time use. Enrollment required.
